---
title: "Project files"
---

ACE projects are saved as `.ace` files.

## What a project file contains

A project file stores imported source text, codebook entries, annotations, notes, coder information, and related project data.

The file is local to your machine unless you deliberately move, copy, sync, or share it.

## Backups

Treat `.ace` files as research data. Keep backups and avoid editing them manually.

## Privacy

ACE does not require a cloud account and does not upload project files automatically. If you store `.ace` files in a cloud-synced folder, that sync is controlled by your storage provider, not by ACE.
